examples: Two storeys have been removed, and an abandoned digger now sits on top of the partly dismantled tower.
In Dujiangyan, a large mechanical digger scoops slabs of concrete and twisted metal rods from a massive pile of rubble.
A digger had carved out three trenches, each about 50 metres long and 1.5 metres deep.
The digger firm said it eventually hoped to teach 540 students from Staffordshire and Derbyshire.
